title: 《美國醒未？》Bill Maher: We Are Not Losing to China, We Lost!

replies.msg:
Youtube: New Rule: Losing to China | Real Time with Bill Maher (HBO) - Bill Maher
https://youtu.be/2DH4v6FnbvM

“New rule: you’re not going to win the battle for the 21st century if you are a silly country,” “And Americans are a silly people.”
“Do you know who doesn’t care that there’s a stereograph of a Chinese man in a Dr. Seuss book? China,”
“All 1.4 billion of them could give a crouching tiger, flying f*ck. Because they’re not a silly people. If anything they’re as serious as a prison fight.”

大概意思：
新規則：喺21世紀你要贏你唔可以係一個ON9國家，而美國人就係ON9仔
中國1.4億人根本唔會著緊蘇斯博士種族歧視，因為佢哋唔係ON9仔，佢哋就好似監獄格鬥咁認真

“there’s got to be something between authoritarian government that tells everyone what to do and a representative government that can’t do anything at all.”
“Nothing ever moves in this impacted colon of a country. We see a problem and we ignore it, lie about it, fight about it, endlessly litigate it, sunset clause it, kick it down the road, and then write a bill where a half-assed solution doesn’t kick in for 10 years,”

極權同代議嘅分別係極權政府控制人叫人做嘢，代議政府咩都做唔到
我哋國家停滯不前（好似大腸有舊屎郁唔到），有問題時我哋逃避，我哋嗌交、不斷打官司、sunset clause it (打官司打好耐然後不了了之），跟住立條無撚用嘅法律，10年都未生效

“China sees a problem and they fix it. They build a dam. We debate what to rename it.”
“In two generations, China has built 500 entire cities from scratch, moved the majority of their huge population from poverty to the middle class, and mostly cornered the market in 5G and pharmaceuticals. Oh, and they bought Africa,”

中國有問題就去解決。佢哋起水壩，我哋就議論改咩名
短短兩代人，中國由零建造500個城市，將窮人變中產，仲壟斷埋5G同製藥業。
OH！佢哋仲買埋非洲

最後：We Lost!

一路睇一路笑，而家先發現中國密密喺背後做咁多嘢
有侵又唔珍惜
Americans are a silly people

難得既心水清

班白左同黑人仲係到嘈緊啲你講句野唔夠好聽冒犯到我，支那已經盤算緊點樣令佢地好快屎都冇得食

美國之所以勁
